message:
chore(beads): sync issue tracker state from concurrent agent updates

Update .beads/issues.jsonl to reflect current task status changes
from parallel agent work sessions. This captures issue lifecycle
transitions (status updates, priority changes, assignee rotations)
that accumulated across multiple concurrent development sessions
without being committed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
